text: Elite Sentinel Unit. They weren't tracking you — they were already here, standing still, watching. The stillness is the warning.
A pristine grocery store. Everything stocked, everything labeled, nothing touched. The robots keep it maintained. You feel watched taking anything.
You can't risk a fire. You sit in the dark of an empty house and eat cold rations and listen to the suburb hum like a machine dreaming.
A maintenance tunnel under an office park. The robots use it, but not right now. You move fast and find a supply cache the resistance left behind.
The water here is optimally filtered. Your body doesn't know what to do with it. Someone's stomach turns inside out.
